creator: uffe@uffe.org
text:
devel/autoconf-archive: port outdated - missing macro AX_CXX_COMPILE_STDCXX_11

port autoconf-archive (ver 2011.01.02) is outdated.

macro AX_CXX_COMPILE_STDCXX_11 (file ax_cxx_compile_stdcxx_11.m4) is found to be missing.

The missing macro is a problem as software begin to test for C++11 features...
